description:
In this episode of This is My Architecture - https://amzn.to/2KRQeA6, Pamela Gotti, Senior Software Engineer, shows us how Credimi uses AWS services to process invoices and seamlessly evolve their system to comply with the new Italian regulations for electronic invoicing.

Host: Francesco Marelli, Senior Solutions Architect
Customer: Pamela Gotti, Senior Software Engineer
